nasb.text: and Ain with its pasture lands and Juttah with its pasture lands and Beth-shemesh with its pasture lands; nine cities from these two tribes.

esv.text: Ain with its pasturelands, Juttah with its pasturelands, Beth-shemesh with its pasturelands—nine cities out of these two tribes;

cnv.text: 亞因和亞因的郊野，淤他和淤他的郊野，伯．示麥和伯．示麥的郊野，共九座城，都是從這兩個支派分出來的。

ccb.text: 亚因、淤他、伯·示麦共九座城及其草场分给了他们。这都是从犹大和西缅两支派分出来的。
